series_metadata.series_description: Weekly/Monthly Reports are records mailed to the Columbus General Office on Friday of each week by the Examiners which reveal the respective office during the current week. Enclosed with the amount of revenue collected as indicated on the report.

retention_rules.disposition: Paper: Retain hard copy records for 1 year after the records have been audited by the Auditor of State and audit report has been released, then destroy., Paper: Wastepaper
